Article.ArticleTitle: Potassium-ion-responsive chiral supramolecular hydrogels exhibiting long-range chirality transfer from D- or L-alanine to achiral frameworks.

Abstract.AbstractText: Applying vibrational circular dichroism (VCD) spectroscopy, we directly reveal hydrated-state supramolecular chirality in K+-responsive chiral supramolecular hydrogels. Combined VCD and induced circular dichroism measurements confirmed that K+-triggered self-assembly enables long-range chirality transfer from a chiral D- or L-alanine residue to an otherwise achiral supramolecular framework.
